data.title: Warren Buffett Dislikes Bitcoin—But Berkshire Hathaway Finds Itself Linked To BTC ETFs Through One Of Its Biggest Holdings
data.description: Warren Buffett's anti-Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) rhetoric has long been discussed in market circles, with many trying to comprehend why one of the world's most valuable assets failed to impress the "Oracle of Omaha."

data.title: Trump's Threat To Fire Powell Could Shake US Financial Markets
data.description: President Donald Trump's potential attempt to dismiss Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell could rattle U.S. financial markets.

data.title: Tesla Reportedly Scales Back Cybertruck Production, Shifts Workers As Sales Plummet: 'The Parking Lot Keeps Getting Emptier'
data.description: Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) is reportedly scaling back its Cybertruck production and shifting workers in response to a sales slump.

data.title: Peter Thiel's Palantir Bags $30 Million Order From ICE For Immigrant Tracking System
data.description: Peter Thiel's Palantir has signed a $29.8 million contract with ICE to enhance immigration enforcement tools and track visa overstays through a new system.
